room.caption: [NightmareE4] The Ghost of Thoughts and Actions Past.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(105) global.mapTeleport=5
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvExGates) instance_create(0,0,oVaultVisualControl)
colorControl=instance_create(0,0,oColorIndControl) colorControl.warnDelay=43
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(11) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)

instance.creationCode: stringToShow="This spot is only here to increase your death count by 1." signSize=1
zoneColor=2 image_xscale=112; image_yscale=112 moveSpd=4; moveDelay=36 direction=270
zoneColor=3 image_xscale=112; image_yscale=112 moveSpd=4; moveDelay=36 direction=180
zoneColor=4 image_xscale=112; image_yscale=112 moveSpd=4; moveDelay=36 direction=90

image_xscale=48; image_yscale=8 xDir=-4 yDir=0 shiftChange=36 doNotPause=0
objectUseN=oTrapProjectile spriteUseN=sSkelefire shootDelayN=60 atkPowerN=8 dirN=180 bulletSpeedN=6
